description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Documentation that runs on push to any branch and on pull requests to the master branch. Use an ubuntu-18.04 job that checks out the code, sets up Node.js 10, installs required tools and dependencies, runs markdownlint on docs, checks assets, builds GitBook documentation, generates PDFs if on the master branch of CopterExpress/clover, and deploys to GitHub Pages if conditions are met.
